title: The Incredible Addon
description: Discover INCREDIBLE abilities and be SUPER!
body:
NOTE: This addon is still in early development. There is currently only a handful of powers and a temporary xp based progression system. A power mastery system is currently being planned out and modeled for future updates.

This addon adds 5 different powers from The Incredibles Universe!

Incredible Strength, 
Cryokinesis, 
Gamma Bursts, 
Dash, 
Piknokinesis,
Hyper Movement


On top of these 5 powers. There is a stat training system to grow

Strength - Use the dumbbell to train your strength

Endurance - Sprint and Swim to gain hearts

Durability - Getting hit gives you natural protection

On top of the currently added powers, there are plenty more planned!

Solar Powered Gravity Manipulation, Telekinesis, Pyrokinesis, Sand Manipulation, Atomic Manipulation, Disintegration Beam, Elasticity, Psychic, Flight, Lazer Gaze, Electrokinesis, Seismic Manipulation, Jack of All Trades, Aerokinesis, Metahuman, Sonic Screams, Plasmoid, Lava Breath, Aquatic, Vapor Manipulation, Storm Manipulation, Ultraviolet, Teleportation, Hydrobreath

To obtain powers, there's only 3 methods currently.
- If you're lucky, there is a 30% chance when you first spawn to obtain a random power
- /superpower
- The DNA Scrambler made using Dragons Breath and Magma Cream
The base power (stat training) is given reguardless of if you have a power or not.

This is my discord server where you guys can vote on the next power i work on, give feedback directly, play on the testing servers, and more!
https://discord.gg/k5n7y3Xugu
